title: More Extra Shield Variants
description: Wood variants for all the shields from IMB11's "Extra Shields" mod
body:
[![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/rxcwq.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-shields)[![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/hekql.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-shield-variants)

# More **_Extra Shield_** Variants 
This add-on for [Extra Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-shields) introduces wood variants for all newly added tiers of shields including all 10 additional wood types and all eight different shield tiers.

![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/gn098.gif)

## Adding 80 new (Extra) Shield variants to [IMB11](https://modrinth.com/member/IMB11)'s [Extra Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-shields).

<sup>Requires [More Shield Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-shield-variants/) and [Extra Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-shields)</sup>
